expected_mechanism: Replace local LightGBM tuning with stable, reviewable interactions across frequency and severity components.
hypothesis: Combine the strongest transparent driver/vehicle structure with vehicle-type segmentation.
known_tradeoff_risk: Transparent interactions may be too rigid or too parameter-heavy to beat the LightGBM benchmark.

model_spec.actuarial_rationale: Transparent GLM structure tests whether stable actuarial interactions can improve pricing without black-box search.
model_spec.description: V2 transparent GLM with splines=True and interactions=DriverAgeBand:CarAgeBand,Power:Brand.
model_spec.hypothesis: Combine the strongest transparent driver/vehicle structure with vehicle-type segmentation.
